zh.lifeSummary: 當John Waye Pollard於大約1390年出生在英國戴文韋 白 迪維頓時，他的父親Walter Pollard IV62歲，母親Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe16歲。他與Alyanora Copplestone在英國戴文瓦也 白 阿申波頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭戴文聖 基路士 在 馮 伍德被列為lord of the manor of way。他去世在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Waye Pollard于大约1390年出生在英国戴文韋 白 迪維頓时，他的父亲Walter Pollard IV62岁，母亲Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe16岁。他与Alyanora Copplestone在英国戴文瓦也 白 阿申波頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰戴文聖 基路士 在 馮 伍德被列为lord of the manor of way。他去世在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Pollard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: perhaps a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English pollard, a derivative of the Middle English verb poll ‘to clip’ or the noun poll ‘the head’. It may have denoted someone with a close‐cropped head or a big head.
from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Pollard, a pet form of Paul (Old French Pol). The surname has been established in both England and Ireland since the 13th century.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Waye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Kay   as a girl's name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Waye Pollard was born about 1390, in Way by Tiverton, Devon, England, his father, Walter Pollard IV, was 62 and his mother, Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe, was 16. He married Alyanora Copplestone in Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as lord of the manor of way in Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England, United Kingdom. He died in Devon, England.

fr.Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England: Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Waye Pollard est né environ 1390, à Way by Tiverton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Walter Pollard IV, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alyanora Copplestone à Waye by Ashburton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of the manor of way à Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé à Devon, Angleterre.

de.Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England: Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Waye Pollard um 1390 in Way by Tiverton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Pollard IV 62 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe 16. Er hat in Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England Alyanora Copplestone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als lord of the manor of way in Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Waye Pollard è nato il circa 1390 nel Way by Tiverton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Walter Pollard IV, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Alyanora Copplestone nel Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of the manor of way nel Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Waye Pollardが約1390年にイギリスデボンワイ ビー ティバートンで生まれた時，父Walter Pollard IVは62歳，母Elizabeth Cornu Carneweは16歳であった。イギリスデボンワイ ビー アシュブルトンでAlyanora Copplestoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスデボンサイント ギレス イン ス ウッドでの職業はlord of the manor of wayと記録されている。彼はイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England: 영국 데폰 세인트 자일스 인 테 우드
ko.lifeSummary: John Waye Pollard(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 데폰 웨이 비 티버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Pollard IV(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe(은)는 16세였다. 그는 영국 데폰 웨이 비 애쉬버턴에서 Alyanora Copplestone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 자일스 인 테 우드에서 lord of the manor of way이었다. 그는 영국 데폰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Waye Pollard nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Way by Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Pollard IV, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Alyanora Copplestone em Waye by Ashburton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como lord of the manor of way em Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England: сеинт джилесь ин т вуд, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Waye Pollard родился около 1390 г. в местности веи би тивиртон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Pollard IV было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alyanora Copplestone в местности веи би ашбуртон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии lord of the manor of way в местности сеинт джилесь ин т вуд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в местности девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Waye Pollard nació aproximadamente 1390, en Way by Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Pollard IV, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cornu Carnewe, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Alyanora Copplestone en Waye by Ashburton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era lord of the manor of way en Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en Devon, Inglaterra.
